headline: Are Options Traders Betting on a Big Move in Arthur J. Gallagher Stock?
summary: Investors need to pay close attention to AJG stock based on the movements in the options market lately.

headline: Arch Capital Leverages Acquisitions to Drive Long-Term Growth
summary: ACGL is using acquisitions to expand specialty insurance, reinsurance and mortgage insurance operations while strengthening its market position.

headline: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. Acquires Cincinnati Benefit Solutions, LLC
summary: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. today announced the acquisition of Ohio-based Cincinnati Benefit Solutions, LLC. Terms of the transaction were not disclosed.
